name: loop-analysis
_note: game-design.loop-analysis sums each modelled core loop's step deltas into a finite netDelta + a balance verdict (balanced / rewarding / draining / leaky / stalling). LENS_ACTIONS handler, 3-arg params path, in-memory per-user, read-only. DEGRADE-GRACEFUL: a game with no loops (or an unknown/empty gameId) returns ok:true with loops:[] + a 'Model core loops…' guidance message — never throws, never no_db. step deltas pass through gdNum so a poisoned delta resolves to 0, keeping netDelta finite. No DB / LLM / network. Not driven by the assassin (LENS_ACTIONS, no derived base); pinned by server/tests/game-design-lens-macros.test.js (delta summation + leaky verdict + empty-store guidance).
